message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

title Client-Server Interaction Sequence Diagram

participant "Client A" as CA
participant "Server" as S
participant "Client B" as CB

note right of CA: p1 (0, 0)
note right of S: p1 (0, 0)
note right of CB: p1 (0, 0)

CA -> S : input: move-forward (id: 1)
activate CA
activate S

note right of CA: Begin movement animation
note right of CA: Finish movement animation
note right of S: Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward

deactivate CA
deactivate S

note right of CA: p1 (0, 1)
note right of S: p1 (0, 1)

CA -> S : input: move-forward (id: 2)
activate CA
activate S

note right of CA: Begin movement animation
S --> CA : update: game-state (ack id: 1)
S -> CB : update: game-state

note right of CA: Finish movement animation
note right of S: Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward

deactivate CA
deactivate S

note right of CA: p1 (0, 2)
note right of S: p1 (0, 2)

S --> CA : update: game-state (ack id: 2)
S -> CB : update: game-state

note right of CB: Begin movement animation
note right of CB: Finish movement animation

note right of CB: p1 (0, 1)

@enduml
```
